result.stdout:
Description:
  Tool to transform Azure Service Bus ARM templates to emulator configuration format

Usage:
  ServiceBusEmulatorConfig.Cli [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  transform  Transform Azure Service Bus ARM template to Emulator config
  web        Transform Azure Service Bus ARM template to Emulator config

commands.payload:
Description:
  Tool to transform Azure Service Bus ARM templates to emulator configuration format

Usage:
  ServiceBusEmulatorConfig.Cli [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  transform  Transform Azure Service Bus ARM template to Emulator config
  web        Transform Azure Service Bus ARM template to Emulator config

result.stdout:
Description:
  Transform Azure Service Bus ARM template to Emulator config

Usage:
  ServiceBusEmulatorConfig.Cli transform [options]

Options:
  -i, --input <input> (REQUIRED)    Path to the ARM template JSON file
  -o, --output <output> (REQUIRED)  Path to save the generated emulator config file
  -n, --namespace <namespace>       The namespace name to use in the emulator config [default: sbemulatorns]
  -?, -h, --help                    Show help and usage information

  -?, -h, --help                    Show help and usage information
